<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band11_chunk003.pdf#page=2 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band11 p102 -->

<!-- header: I ANDKREIS TRAUNSTEIN · KLOSTERSEEON -->

<!-- header: LANDKREIS TRAUNSTEIN · KLOSTERSEEON -->


[[File:Band11_chunk003_p002_img001.jpg|thumb|W<sub>4</sub> Leopold III. der Babenberger, Markgraf von Österreich]]



[[File:Band11_chunk003_p002_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band11 p103 -->
